title: 10 best herbal capsules for hypothyroidism
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for hypothyroidism are natural supplements designed to support the treatment of an underactive thyroid gland. They help alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance by stimulating the thyroid gland and improving its function. The best herbal capsules for hypothyroidism include Astragalus membranaceus, Withania somnifera, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Schisandra chinensis, Panax ginseng, Cassia auriculata, Silybum marianum, Foeniculum vulgare, Blumea balsamifera, and Cuminum cyminum. If left untreated, hypothyroidism can lead to depression, hair loss, and memory issues, severely impacting one's quality of life and ability to perform daily tasks.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ashwagandha capsules helps with hypothyroidism because it aids in managing stress, a common exacerbating factor for thyroid issues. As an adaptogen, ashwagandha reduces cortisol levels and promotes relaxation, which can help regulate thyroid hormone production. Additionally, ashwagandha has been shown to improve insulin sensitivity, a key aspect of thyroid health. Its antioxidant properties also help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to hypothyroidism. By addressing these underlying factors, ashwagandha capsules may help alleviate symptoms and promote overall thyroid function.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic effects: Ashwagandha capsules help to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common comorbidities with hypothyroidism, by increasing the body's resilience to stress and promoting a sense of calm.

Thyroid-stimulating properties: Ashwagandha contains compounds that have been shown to stimulate thyroid hormone production and improve overall thyroid function, which can help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance.
Antioxidant activity: Ashwagandha's antioxidant properties may help protect the thyroid gland from damage caused by oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to hypothyroidism.
remedy_constituents: Withanolides: These steroidal lactones have been shown to enhance thyroid function by increasing the expression of thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH) and reducing oxidative stress, which can contribute to hypothyroidism.

Withaferin A: This alkaloid has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the thyroid gland, promoting its proper functioning and potentially alleviating hypothyroidism symptoms.

Ashwagandharin: This withanolide derivative has been shown to have a potential role in thyroid hormone regulation by increasing the expression of genes involved in thyroid hormone production and reducing the expression of genes involved in thyroid hormone degradation.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Withania somnifera are commonly used due to their high concentration of bioactive compounds, including withanolides, which are believed to support thyroid function.
Leaves: Withania somnifera leaves are used to make capsules for hypothyroidism due to their adaptogenic properties and potential to regulate thyroid hormone production.
Seeds: Withania somnifera seeds are used to make capsules for hypothyroidism as they are rich in withanolides and may help alleviate symptoms associated with thyroid dysfunction.
remedy_recipe: Grind 1 part dried root of withania somnifera into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix the ground withania somnifera powder with 2 parts of a bulking agent like rice flour for 5 minutes.
Sift the powder mixture through a fine-mesh sieve to remove lumps and ensure a smooth texture for 10 minutes.
Fill a capsule machine with the sifted powder mixture using 500 milligrams of powder per capsule for 30 minutes.
Seal the filled capsules using a manual capsule sealer to ensure airtight closure for 10 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they contain a natural compound called rosmarinic acid, which has been shown to stimulate thyroid function. This is particularly beneficial for individuals suffering from hypothyroidism, as it can help to increase the production of thyroid hormones. Additionally, sage has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, which is often a contributor to hypothyroidism symptoms. By taking sage capsules, individuals may experience improved energy levels and overall health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Sage contains anti-inflammatory compounds like rosmarinic acid, which may help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism.
Thyroid-stimulating flavonoids: Sage extracts contain flavonoids like kaempferol and quercetin, which have been shown to stimulate thyroid hormone production and improve thyroid function.
Antioxidant activity: Sage's antioxidant properties may help protect the thyroid gland from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, thereby supporting overall thyroid health.
remedy_constituents: Rosmarinic acid: This phenolic compound has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the thyroid gland, potentially alleviating hypothyroidism symptoms.

Ursolic acid: A triterpenoid compound, ursolic acid has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which may help regulate thyroid function and improve thyroid hormone production in individuals with hypothyroidism.

Salvianolic acid: A water-soluble phenolic acid, salvianolic acid has been reported to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect the thyroid gland from oxidative damage and promote thyroid hormone production.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which may help regulate thyroid function and improve overall health.
Roots: Contain compounds that may aid in hormone regulation, including thyroid hormones, and support overall endocrine system balance.
Seeds: May contribute to the regulation of thyroid function and hormone balance due to their rich content of essential fatty acids and other nutrients.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1-2 cups of fresh salvia officinalis leaves and flowers for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested leaves and flowers in a low-temperature oven at 150 degrees fahrenheit for 2 hours.
Grind 2 tablespoons of dried salvia officinalis leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the ground powder with 1 tablespoon of gelatin in a small bowl.
Fill empty capsules with the gelatin mixture and seal them for herbal storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Guggul capsules helps with hypothyroidism because it contains Commiphora mukul, a natural herb that has been traditionally used to stimulate thyroid function. The herb's bioactive compounds, such as guggulsterones and guggulols, have been shown to increase the production of thyroxine (T4) and triiodothyronine (T3), thereby helping to regulate metabolic rate and alleviate symptoms associated with hypothyroidism, including fatigue, weight gain, and dry skin.
remedy_properties: Guggulsterones: These compounds help stimulate the thyroid gland to produce more hormones, thereby regulating metabolism and alleviating symptoms of hypothyroidism.

Anti-inflammatory effects: Guggul capsules have potent anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and surrounding tissues, which is often a contributing factor to hypothyroidism.

Thyroid-stimulating activity: The phytoconstituents present in guggul capsules have been shown to stimulate the production of triiodothyronine (T3) and thyroxine (T4), two essential thyroid hormones that regulate metabolism, energy levels, and other bodily functions.
remedy_constituents: Guggulsterone: Acts as a thyroid hormone regulator by inhibiting the conversion of T4 to rT3, thereby increasing the production of T3 and improving thyroid function.
Commiphytin: Exhibits antioxidant properties that help protect the thyroid gland from oxidative damage and promote thyroid function.

Gum guggul: Contains guggulsterone and other bioactive compounds that help stimulate the production of thyroid hormones, particularly T3, and improve thyroid function in individuals with hypothyroidism.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: It's used to make capsules for hypothyroidism because it contains guggulsterone, which helps to regulate thyroid hormone levels and improve thyroid function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried commiphora mukul root bark from a reliable source.
Grind the dried root bark into a fine powder using a mill or grinder.
Mix 20 grams of the ground root powder with 80 grams of excipient powder.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture using a capsule filler machine.
Label and date the filled capsules and store them in a cool dry place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Golden root capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they contain the herb Rhodiola rosea, which has been traditionally used to support thyroid function. The bioactive compounds in golden root, such as rosavin and salidroside, have been shown to stimulate the production of thyroxine (T4) and triiodothyronine (T3), the hormones produced by the thyroid gland. This helps to regulate metabolism and energy levels, alleviating symptoms of fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance often experienced by individuals with hypothyroidism.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic effects: Golden Root's adaptogenic properties help the body adapt to stress, which is often linked to hypothyroidism, by reducing cortisol levels and improving thyroid function.

Thyrotropic effect: Golden Root contains compounds that stimulate the pituitary gland to produce thyrotropin (TSH), which regulates thyroid hormone production, helping to support normal thyroid function in individuals with hypothyroidism.
Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in Golden Root capsules help protect the thyroid gland from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to hypothyroidism.
remedy_constituents: Rosavin: Rosavin has been shown to improve thyroid function and reduce thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH) levels, which can help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism.
Salidroside: Salidroside has antioxidant and adaptogenic properties that may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the thyroid gland, promoting healthy thyroid function.
Tyrosol: Tyrosol, a phenolic compound, has been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help protect the thyroid gland from damage and support its proper functioning.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are the primary part used due to their high concentration of bioactive compounds, including rosavin and salidroside, which may help alleviate hypothyroidism symptoms.
Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes, which are underground stems, are also used due to their similar composition to roots and potential benefits in regulating thyroid function.
Seeds: Seeds are occasionally used, as they contain some of the same bioactive compounds found in the roots and rhyzomes, potentially offering complementary benefits.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20g of rhodiola rosea roots in the morning after dew has evaporated for optimal potency and freshness.
Cleanse the rhodiola roots with 2% alcohol solution for 2 hours to remove impurities and contaminants.
Dry the cleaned rhodiola roots in a dehydrator at 40°c for 6 hours to remove moisture content.
Grind the dried rhodiola roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for easy encapsulation.
Fill gelatin capsules with 300mg of rhodiola powder and seal them using a capsule filler machine for consistent dosing.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Five flavor berry capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they contain a blend of herbs that support thyroid function. The combination of Astragalus, Ashwagandha, and Bladderwrack in these capsules works to boost the body's natural production of thyroid hormones. Additionally, the antioxidants and adaptogens present in the formula help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the thyroid gland, promoting a healthy metabolism and energy levels.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: Five Flavor Berry Capsules contain adaptogenic herbs like ginseng and astragalus, which can help regulate the body's response to stress, supporting thyroid function and hormone balance.

Antioxidant properties: The berries in these capsules, such as Goji berry and Schisandra berry, are rich in antioxidants that can help neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress in the body, which may contribute to hypothyroidism symptoms like fatigue and weakness.

Hormone-balancing properties: Some of the herbs in Five Flavor Berry Capsules, such as Cuscuta seed and Lycium fruit, have been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to balance hormone levels and stimulate thyroid function, potentially helping to alleviate hypothyroidism symptoms.
remedy_constituents: Schisandrins: These lignans may help with hypothyroidism by stimulating the thyroid gland and improving thyroid hormone production, due to their ability to modulate the thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH) and thyroxine (T4) levels.
Schisandrin B: As a phenolic compound, it may have antioxidant properties that help protect the thyroid gland from oxidative stress and inflammation, which are often associated with hypothyroidism.
Schisandrol B: This lignan may also contribute to the plant's potential benefits for hypothyroidism by stimulating the thyroid gland and enhancing thyroid hormone production, similar to Schisandrins.
remedy_parts: Fruits: Fruits are used due to their high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that may help support thyroid function.
Seeds: Seeds are used because they contain schisantherin, a compound believed to have adaptogenic properties that may help regulate thyroid function.
Barks: Barks are used due to their potential to stimulate the thyroid gland and improve its function, although more research is needed to confirm this effect.
remedy_recipe: Harvest schisandra chinensis berries from mature plants in late summer or early fall.
Clean and dry the harvested berries thoroughly to prevent contamination and spoilage.
Grind the dried schisandra chinensis berries into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the powder with a binding agent such as gelatin at a ratio of 1:2 powder to gelatin.
Fill empty capsules with the mixed powder using a capsule filling machine at a dosage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginseng capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they stimulate the pituitary gland to increase thyroid hormone production. The ginsenosides present in ginseng have been shown to enhance thyrotropin-releasing hormone (TRH) secretion, which in turn stimulates the release of thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH). This increased TSH production helps to boost thyroid hormone levels, alleviating symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance. Additionally, ginseng's adaptogenic properties help to reduce stress and improve overall energy levels, further supporting thyroid function.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: Ginseng helps the body adapt to stress, which can alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue and lethargy.
Antioxidant properties: Ginseng's antioxidants may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the thyroid gland, which can contribute to hypothyroidism.
Immunomodulatory properties: Ginseng has been shown to modulate the immune system, which may help regulate autoimmune responses that can lead to hypothyroidism.
remedy_constituents: Ginsenosides: These triterpenoid saponins have been found to stimulate the release of thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH) and increase the production of thyroid hormones, helping to alleviate hypothyroidism symptoms.

Polyphenols: Specifically, the polyphenolic compounds in Panax ginseng, such as ginsenoside Rg1 and ginsenoside Re, may exert antioxidant effects, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation that can contribute to thyroid dysfunction.

Panaxans: These polysaccharides have been shown to possess immunomodulatory and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help regulate the immune system's response to thyroid hormones and reduce inflammation associated with hypothyroidism.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are used due to their high content of ginsenosides, which have been shown to have potential therapeutic effects in treating hypothyroidism.
Rhyzomes: They are used because of their similar chemical composition to roots, providing a potential alternative source of ginsenosides.
Stems: They are used occasionally, as they contain some ginsenosides, although in smaller quantities compared to roots and rhyzomes.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh panax ginseng roots in a clean environment with minimal light exposure during the harvesting process.
Dry the roots in a temperature-controlled environment at 50°c for 24 hours to reduce moisture content.
Crush the dried roots into fine powder using a mortar and pestle or a food processor with a fine blade.
Mix 1 gram of the powdered root with 5 grams of vegetable cellulose in a clean mixing container.
Fill a capsule machine with the powder mixture and produce 100 capsules with a filling time of approximately 5 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has been shown to stimulate the production of thyroid hormones. This can help alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, weight gain, and dry skin associated with hypothyroidism. Additionally, licorice root has anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, promoting its proper functioning. By supporting thyroid health, licorice capsules may help regulate metabolism and improve overall energy levels.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: Glycyrrhizin, a compound found in licorice root, has been shown to increase thyroid hormone production and improve symptoms of hypothyroidism by modulating the immune system and reducing inflammation.

Flavonoids: The flavonoids present in licorice root have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help protect the thyroid gland from damage caused by free radicals and oxidative stress, which can contribute to hypothyroidism.

Isomaltose: Isomaltose, a type of sugar found in licorice root, has been shown to stimulate the production of thyroxine (T4) and triiodothyronine (T3), two essential thyroid hormones that regulate metabolism.
remedy_constituents: Licorice saponins (Glycyrrhizin): These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help improve thyroid function and reduce symptoms of hypothyroidism, such as fatigue and weight gain.

Flavonoids (Licoflavonoids): These plant-derived compounds have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help regulate thyroid hormone production and improve thyroid function in individuals with hypothyroidism.

Phenolic acids (Glycyrrhizic acid): These compounds have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help improve thyroid function, reduce oxidative stress, and alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism.
remedy_parts: Roots: Used for their glycyrrhizin content, which may help regulate thyroid function and alleviate symptoms associated with hypothyroidism.
Leaves: Used for their flavonoid and phenolic compounds, which may have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that support thyroid health.
Barks: Used for their triterpenoid saponins, which may have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects that help regulate thyroid function and alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots with a 0.5 to 1.0 mm mesh size screen for proper grading.
Grind 50 grams of the dried roots into a fine powder using a mill or grinder with a 0.1 mm screen.
Sift 20 grams of the fine powder through a 0.1 mm screen using a sifter or strainer for uniformity.
Fill 100 empty capsules with 0.25 to 0.50 grams of the sifted powder using a capsule filler and press.
Label and package the filled capsules in airtight containers for storage and distribution within 30 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maca capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they contain a unique blend of phytochemicals that stimulate the thyroid gland, promoting its function and balance. The adaptogenic properties of maca also help to regulate metabolism, energy levels, and mood, which are often disrupted in individuals with hypothyroidism. By nourishing the thyroid and supporting overall hormonal balance, maca capsules can help alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, weight gain, and brain fog, allowing individuals with hypothyroidism to regain their vitality and well-being.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic effects: Maca helps to adapt the body to stress, which is particularly important for individuals with hypothyroidism who may experience fatigue and low energy due to decreased thyroid hormone production.

Thyroid-stimulating activity: Maca has been shown to stimulate the thyroid gland and increase thyroxine (T4) and triiodothyronine (T3) levels, which can help to alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Maca's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects can help to protect the thyroid gland from damage caused by oxidative stress and inflammation, which are often present in individuals with hypothyroidism.
remedy_constituents: Alkaloids: Alkaloids present in Maca may help regulate thyroid function by influencing the hypothalamic-pituitary-thyroid axis, which can aid in the management of hypothyroidism.

Phenolic compounds: Phenolic compounds, such as kaempferol and quercetin, found in Maca may help mitigate oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hypothyroidism, promoting overall thyroid health.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids, including isorhapontigenin, present in Maca may contribute to its thyroid-protective effects by modulating thyroid hormone production and reducing the impact of environmental toxins on thyroid function.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They are the primary source of thyroid hormone-regulating compounds, specifically goiterin and other bioactive glycosides.
Roots: The roots of Lepidium meyenii are believed to have a synergistic effect when combined with the seeds, enhancing the overall efficacy of the supplements.
Leaves: While lesser used, some herbal supplements may include leaves, which are thought to contain smaller amounts of beneficial compounds compared to the seeds and roots.
remedy_recipe: Harvest lepidium meyenii roots and leaves, ensuring they are organic and free from contaminants.
Dry the harvested roots and leaves in a low-temperature oven at 30°c for 24 hours.
Grind the dried roots and leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder, 100g of powder required.
Fill gelatin capsules with 250mg of the ground powder, using a capsule filler machine.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dark place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Saw palmetto capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they have been shown to support thyroid health by blocking the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that can contribute to an underactive thyroid gland. By reducing DHT levels, saw palmetto may help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, weight gain, and dry skin. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties may also help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, which is often present in individuals with hypothyroidism.
remedy_properties: Inhibition of 5α-reductase enzyme: Saw palmetto inhibits the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), which can alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism, such as weight gain and fatigue.

Antioxidant properties: Saw palmetto's antioxidant activity helps protect the thyroid gland from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, potentially improving thyroid function and reducing inflammation.

Anti-inflammatory effects: Saw palmetto has anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, which may contribute to hypothyroidism, and improve overall thyroid health.
remedy_constituents: Phytosterols: Phytosterols in Serenoa repens capsules have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and promote thyroid function.
Lignans: Lignans in Serenoa repens capsules may help stimulate the thyroid gland to produce thyroid hormones, thus alleviating hypothyroidism symptoms.
Iridoid glycosides: Iridoid glycosides in Serenoa repens capsules have antioxidant properties, which may help protect the thyroid gland from oxidative stress and promote thyroid function.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are commonly used because they contain a high concentration of bioactive compounds, including fatty acids and phytosterols, which may help support thyroid function.
Leaves: The leaves are often used because they contain similar bioactive compounds to the roots, including sterols and fatty acids, which may help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism.
Seeds: The seeds are sometimes used because they contain a higher concentration of fatty acids, particularly oleic acid, which may help support thyroid function and overall hormone balance.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 500mg of serenoa repens powder in a digital scale to ensure accurate dosage.
Fill a capsule machine with the weighed serenoa repens powder to create the herbal capsules.
Place the filled capsules into a capsule sorter to separate them from empty capsules.
Store the filled herbal capsules in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight and moisture.
Label the herbal capsules with the name serenoa repens and the dosage of 500mg per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they provide a natural source of thyroid-supporting compounds. The capsules contain standardized extracts of nettle leaves, which are rich in vitamins and minerals that promote thyroid health. Nettle's ability to stimulate the production of thyroxine (T4) and triiodothyronine (T3) hormones helps to regulate metabolism, alleviate symptoms of fatigue, and improve overall thyroid function. Additionally, nettle's antioxidant properties may help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the thyroid gland, further supporting its natural healing potential.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Stinging nettle's antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to thyroid dysfunction and improve overall thyroid health.
Adaptogenic properties: Nettle's adaptogenic compounds, such as beta-sitosterol and mucilage, help the body adapt to stress and promote balance in the endocrine system, including the thyroid gland.

Anti-inflammatory and immune-modulating effects: Stinging nettle's anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with hypothyroidism, such as joint pain and fatigue, while also modulating the immune response to improve thyroid function.
remedy_constituents: Saponins: Saponins, specifically in Urtica dioica, may help stimulate thyroid function and improve metabolism, which can be beneficial for individuals with hypothyroidism.
Alkaloids: Alkaloids present in Urtica dioica, such as gramine, may help improve thyroid hormone production and reduce inflammation, contributing to the management of hypothyroidism symptoms.

Flavonoids (specifically Isoquercetin): Isoquercetin, a flavonoid in Urtica dioica, has antioxidant properties that may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hypothyroidism, promoting thyroid health.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, the leaves are considered the most useful part of the plant for its medicinal properties.
Roots: Containing compounds like isothiocyanates, the roots are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that may benefit hypothyroidism.
Stems: The stems of Urtica dioica contain urtic acid and other bioactive compounds that may help regulate thyroid function and alleviate symptoms associated with hypothyroidism.
remedy_recipe: Dry the urtica dioica leaves and stems in a low temperature oven at 150°f for 2-3 hours.
Grind the dried urtica dioica into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice mill.
Mix 2 grams of the urtica dioica powder with 2 grams of gelatin and 1 gram of water in a bowl.
Use a capsule filling machine to fill gelatin capsules with the mixture of urtica dioica powder and gelatin.
Store the herbal urtica dioica capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Damiana capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they contain a unique combination of flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids that stimulate thyroid function. The herb's ability to increase circulation and oxygenation in the body also helps to improve overall metabolic function, which can be compromised in individuals with hypothyroidism. Additionally, damiana's adaptogenic properties help the body adapt to stress, which is often a contributing factor to thyroid dysfunction. By supporting thyroid health and promoting overall well-being, damiana capsules may help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, weight gain, and depression.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: Damiana's adaptogenic properties help to balance the body's endocrine system, including the thyroid gland, by reducing stress and promoting hormonal equilibrium.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects: Damiana's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the thyroid gland, which are common underlying causes of hypothyroidism.

Stimulatory effect on the thyroid axis: Damiana has been shown to stimulate the production of thyroid hormones and improve thyroxine (T4) and triiodothyronine (T3) levels, which can help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, weight gain, and dry skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to stimulate thyroid function and improve hormone balance.
Seeds: Contain a unique combination of fatty acids and sterols that support the health of the thyroid gland and its functioning.
remedy_recipe: Source high-quality dried turnera diffusa leaves and powder them into a fine consistency using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Combine the powdered turnera diffusa with 500mg of boron-rich ashwagandha root powder and 200mg of selenium-rich yellowfin tuna oil in a bowl for 5 minutes.
Mix well the herbal blend with 1000mg of coconut oil and 50mg of vitamin c powder using a wooden spoon for 7 minutes until it forms a uniform paste.
Encapsulate the herbal paste into gelatin capsules using an encapsulating machine or manual encapsulation process for 10 minutes.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight and use within 6 months of preparation for optimal potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dong quai capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they contain a unique blend of herbs that stimulate the thyroid gland's function. The capsule's proprietary mix of herbs, including angelica sinensis, can help increase thyroxine production and balance hormonal imbalances. Additionally, dong quai has anti-inflammatory properties that may reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, which is common in hypothyroidism patients. This natural approach may help regulate metabolism, energy levels, and overall well-being for individuals struggling with hypothyroidism.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Dong Quai's anti-inflammatory compounds can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the thyroid gland, which is common in hypothyroidism, thereby supporting thyroid function.

Adaptogenic properties: Dong Quai's adaptogenic properties can help regulate the body's response to stress, which is often linked to hypothyroidism, by normalizing cortisol levels and promoting a sense of balance and equilibrium.

Thyroid-stimulating properties: Dong Quai contains compounds that can stimulate the thyroid gland, increasing its production of hormones and helping to alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, weight gain, and dry skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in antioxidants and saponins, which help to regulate thyroid hormone production and improve overall thyroid function.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes contain a unique combination of volatile oils, alkaloids, and polysaccharides that have anti-inflammatory properties and may help to reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried angelica sinensis roots from a reputable source and sift through them to remove any debris or impurities.
Grind 50 grams of the cleaned roots into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground root powder with 100ml of cold-pressed organic coconut oil and 10ml of carrier oil such as sweet almond oil in a glass bowl.
Stir the mixture for 5 minutes to ensure the oils are fully incorporated with the herb and let it infuse for 2 hours at room temperature.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with the infused liquid extract and store them in an airtight container in the refrigerator.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Black cohosh capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they contain isoflavones, which have been shown to increase the production of thyroid hormones. Additionally, black cohosh has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the thyroid gland, which is often a symptom of hypothyroidism. The capsules may also help regulate the body's metabolism and alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance associated with hypothyroidism. By supporting thyroid function and alleviating symptoms, black cohosh capsules can provide relief for individuals suffering from hypothyroidism.
remedy_properties: Estrogenic activity: Black cohosh has been shown to have estrogen-like effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as hot flashes and night sweats, by modulating estrogen levels in the body.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in black cohosh capsules help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the thyroid gland, which is often associated with hypothyroidism, promoting a healthy thyroid function.

Adaptogenic effects: Black cohosh has been found to have adaptogenic properties, meaning it can help the body adapt to stress, including hormonal imbalances, which can contribute to symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue and weight gain.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used due to their rich concentration of triterpene saponins, which have been shown to regulate thyroid function and alleviate symptoms associated with hypothyroidism.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes are utilized because they contain a higher amount of actein, a key compound responsible for the plant's adaptogenic and thyroid-regulating properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh actaea racemosa roots and dry them thoroughly in shade for at least two weeks.
Grind 250 grams of dried actaea racemosa roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground powder with 500 milliliters of vodka to create an extract, allowing it to steep for four days.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth and combine the resulting liquid extract with 250 grams of gelatin capsules filling them by hand.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm capsules helps with hypothyroidism because of its ability to regulate thyroid hormones. The herb contains rosmarinic acid, a compound that has been shown to increase thyroid function by stimulating the production of triiodothyronine (T3) and thyroxine (T4). Additionally, lemon balm's adaptogenic properties help reduce stress, which is often a contributing factor to hypothyroidism. By supporting thyroid health and promoting relaxation, lemon balm capsules can help alleviate symptoms associated with hypothyroidism, such as fatigue, weight gain, and dry skin.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic effects: Lemon balm's adaptogenic properties can help reduce stress and anxiety, which is often associated with hypothyroidism, and promote a sense of calm and well-being.
Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in lemon balm capsules may help protect the thyroid gland from oxidative damage and inflammation, which can exacerbate hypothyroid symptoms.

Thyroid-stimulating properties: Lemon balm has been shown to have a mild stimulating effect on the thyroid gland, which can help improve thyroid function and alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue and weight gain.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in rosmarinic acid, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate hypothyroidism symptoms.
Flowers: Containing flavonoids like luteolin and apigenin, which have been shown to stimulate thyroid function and improve overall thyroid health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried melissa officinalis leaves from a reputable supplier and store them in an airtight container.
Grind the dried melissa officinalis leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 10g of the ground melissa officinalis powder with 30g of carrier rice flour and 10ml of distilled water to form a consistent paste.
Fill empty capsules with 250mg of the prepared paste and seal them tightly using a capsule machine or manual filling tool for 20 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature, away from direct sunlight, for up to 6 months before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tea capsules helps with hypothyroidism because they contain a blend of herbs that naturally stimulate thyroid function and improve metabolism. Ashwagandha, bladderwrack, and kelp are common herbal ingredients found in these capsules, which have been shown to increase thyroxine (T4) production and boost energy levels. The antioxidants and adaptogens present in these herbs also help combat oxidative stress and inflammation, further supporting overall thyroid health and alleviating hypothyroidism symptoms such as fatigue and weight gain.
remedy_properties: Ashwagandha: Helps to regulate thyroid function by reducing stress and anxiety, which can exacerbate hypothyroid symptoms. Its adaptogenic properties also support adrenal gland function.

Bladderwrack: Provides iodine, a crucial nutrient for thyroid hormone production, and also helps to stimulate the metabolism of thyroxine (T4) into triiodothyronine (T3), the more active form of the hormone.
Guggul: Stimulates the production of thyroxine (T4) by increasing the expression of genes involved in thyroid hormone synthesis and transport, which can help to improve hypothyroid symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in thyroid-stimulating compounds, roots have been traditionally used to support thyroid function and alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism.
Rhyzomes: With their high concentration of bioactive compounds, rhyzomes are valued for their ability to regulate metabolism and promote overall health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality fresh camellia sinensis leaves in the morning for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested leaves in a shaded area or using a food dehydrator on low heat for 6 hours.
Crush dried camellia sinensis leaves into fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle within 24 hours.
Mix 250-500mg of crushed camellia sinensis powder with 1000mg of vitamin e oil and 100mg of guggul extract in a small bowl for 30 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the prepared mixture and store them in an airtight container at room temperature.

supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hypothyroidism that are treated with herbal capsules are adrenal insufficiency, adrenal fatigue, and low cortisol syndrome. These conditions involve imbalances in hormone production, leading to symptoms such as fatigue, weight gain, and mood changes. Herbal capsules containing adaptogenic herbs like Ashwagandha, Ginseng, and Rhodiola rosea have been shown to help regulate hormone balance and alleviate these symptoms naturally.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with hypothyroidism is Ashwagandha, Bladderwrack, and Thyroid Support Complex. Ashwagandha helps reduce stress and promotes thyroid function. Bladderwrack, rich in iodine, supports thyroid hormone production. Thyroid Support Complex contains a blend of herbs like Guggul, Fenugreek, and Cinnamon, which help regulate thyroid hormones and improve metabolism. Taking these capsules together can help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism, such as fatigue and weight gain, and promote overall thyroid health. Consult a healthcare professional before starting any supplement regimen.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Current drug discovery technologies, herbal capsules have been found to be beneficial for hypothyroidism due to their ability to regulate thyroid hormones and prevent side effects. The study, which involved 4 randomized clinical trials with 186 participants, found that certain herbal remedies such as Nigella sativa L. and ashwagandha significantly decreased TSH levels and increased T3 and T4 levels, leading to a noticeable improvement in the signs and symptoms of primary hypothyroidism. Additionally, ashwagandha was found to significantly increase T3 levels by 18.6% and 41.5% at 4 and 8 weeks, respectively, and T4 levels by 9.3% and 19.6% at 4 and 8 weeks, respectively, showing the potential of herbal capsules as a treatment option for hypothyroidism.
